refactorings_applied: Consolidated duplicate imports from @/lib/polling/auto-yes-manager in stalled-detector.ts (two separate import lines merged into one)

code_quality_assessment.overall: The Issue #600 code is well-structured with high quality. SOLID principles are properly applied throughout.
strengths: Clean separation of concerns: hooks are stateless processors (useWorktreeList), pure functions are extracted for testability (resolveLayoutConfig, getNextAction)
Exhaustive switch patterns with never checks prevent future enum extension bugs (toLeftPaneTab, toMobileActivePane, getStatusColor)
Security-conscious design: deep link validation with whitelist (isDeepLinkPane), include parameter parsing with whitelist (parseIncludeParam)
Proper memoization in hooks (useMemo for derived data, useCallback for event handlers)
Well-defined TypeScript interfaces exported for all hook return types
No any type usage found in any of the new files
Constants extracted to config files (review-config.ts, z-index.ts) following existing project patterns
minor_observations: useSendMessage: isSending state in useCallback deps could theoretically allow race conditions under rapid clicks, but the guard pattern is acceptable for this use case

sessions/page.tsx duplicates filtering logic that useWorktreeList provides, but useWorktreeList works with SidebarBranchItem[] not Worktree[] - type adaptation would add complexity without clear benefit (YAGNI)
Header.tsx NAV_ITEMS and GlobalMobileNav.tsx MOBILE_NAV_TABS define similar navigation data for different contexts (5 PC tabs vs 4 mobile tabs) - this is intentional design, not duplication

message: Refactoring analysis complete. The Issue #600 codebase is well-structured with minimal improvement needed. One concrete fix applied: consolidated duplicate import lines in stalled-detector.ts. All 5900 tests pass, 0 ESLint errors, 0 TypeScript errors.
